name: preflight
command: Continue='Continue'; git status --short; git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; git rev-parse HEAD; git log -1 --oneline; node --version; try { pnpm --version } catch { 'pnpm_missing: '+.Exception.Message }; docker --version; docker compose version; corepack --version; corepack pnpm -v; docker info --format 'Server={{.ServerVersion}};OSType={{.OSType}};Containers={{.Containers}};Images={{.Images}}'

name: preflight
command: & { $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; git status --short; git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; git rev-parse HEAD; git log -1 --oneline; node --version; try { pnpm --version } catch { Write-Output ('pnpm_missing: ' + $_.Exception.Message) }; docker --version; docker compose version; corepack --version; corepack pnpm -v; docker info --format 'Server={{.ServerVersion}};OSType={{.OSType}};Containers={{.Containers}};Images={{.Images}}' }

name: preflight
command: & { $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; git status --short; git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; git rev-parse HEAD; git log -1 --oneline; node --version; try { pnpm --version } catch { Write-Output ('pnpm_missing: ' + $_.Exception.Message) }; docker --version; docker compose version; corepack --version; corepack pnpm -v; docker info --format 'Server={{.ServerVersion}};OSType={{.OSType}};Containers={{.Containers}};Images={{.Images}}' }

name: discovery-rg-probe
command: & { $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; rg -n 'Stage 18|stage18|Stage 19|stage19|Stage 20|stage20' docs apps packages scripts tests package.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output ('rg_exit=' + $LASTEXITCODE) } }

name: discovery-stage18-20
command: & { $patterns = @('Stage 18','stage18','Этап 18','Stage18','Stage 19','stage19','Этап 19','Stage19','Stage 20','stage20','Этап 20','Stage20','AI Gateway','ai-gateway','deepseek-v4-flash','CometAPI','Route Valves','automation_planner_high','assistant-ui','ExternalStoreRuntime','AnythingLLM','LibreChat','Chatbot UI','AutomationBlueprint','AutomationIntent','Automation Builder','Activepieces MCP','MCP','workflow draft','canvas draft','project knowledge','chat threads','message actions','runtime draft','compile preview'); Get-ChildItem -Path docs,apps,packages,scripts,tests -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String -Pattern $patterns -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 500 Path,LineNumber,Line | Format-List }

name: discovery-scripts-inventory
command: const p=require('./package.json').scripts; for (const k of Object.keys(p).filter(k=>/^stage(18|19|20):/.test(k)||/stage(18|19|20)|playwright|e2e|check|security|audit|release/i.test(k)).sort()) console.log(k+' = '+p[k])

name: reference-provenance-local-repos
command: & { $repos = @('E:\assistant-ui-main','E:\chatbot-ui-main','E:\anything-llm-master','E:\LibreChat-main'); $patterns = @('license','LICENSE','MIT','ISC','chat','thread','conversation','message','stream','runtime','external store','attachment','file','tool','tool call','human confirmation','branch','fork','search','workspace','document','knowledge','rag','vector','agent','skill','prompt','apiKey','secret','OPENAI','DEEPSEEK','COMET','ANTHROPIC','workflow','automation','planner','assistant action','action card','artifact','tool approval','mcp','function call','json schema','structured output'); foreach ($repo in $repos) { Write-Output ('### repo=' + $repo); if (!(Test-Path $repo)) { Write-Output 'missing'; continue }; git -C $repo status --short; git -C $repo rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; git -C $repo rev-parse HEAD; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $repo 'package.json')) { Get-Content -Raw (Join-Path $repo 'package.json') | Select-Object -First 1 }; Get-ChildItem $repo -Force | Select-Object -First 80 Name,Mode,Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-ChildItem $repo -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '\\(node_modules|\.git|\.next|dist|build|coverage)\\' } | Select-String -Pattern $patterns -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 300 Path,LineNumber,Line | Format-List } }

name: static-architecture-security-scan
command: & { $groups = @( @{Name='secret-env'; Paths=@('apps/web','apps/backend','packages','scripts','docs'); Patterns=@('localStorage','sessionStorage','NEXT_PUBLIC','SERVICE_ROLE','API_KEY','PRIVATE_KEY','SIGNING','SECRET','OPENAI','XAI','COMET','DEEPSEEK','ANTHROPIC','ACTIVEPIECES','AP_','MCP')}, @{Name='network-runtime'; Paths=@('apps/web/src','apps/backend/src','packages'); Patterns=@('fetch(','axios','supabase.from','createClient','activepieces','ai-gateway','workflow-draft','canvas-ai','automation-builder','mcp','tool server','provider')}, @{Name='test-bypass'; Paths=@('apps','packages','tests','scripts'); Patterns=@('TODO','FIXME','skip(','test.skip','describe.skip','it.skip','.only(','force.*true','bypass','temporary','hack','allowUnsafe','ignorePolicy','disableValidation')}, @{Name='legacy-provider'; Paths=@('apps','packages','tests','docs'); Patterns=@('deepseek-chat','deepseek-reasoner','gpt-.*default','model selector','provider selector','direct provider','api.cometapi.com','api.openai.com','api.deepseek.com')} ); foreach ($group in $groups) { Write-Output ('### scan=' + $group.Name); Get-ChildItem -Path $group.Paths -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String -Pattern $group.Patterns -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 300 Path,LineNumber,Line | Format-List } }

name: static-architecture-security-scan
command: & { $exclude='\\(node_modules|\.git|\.next|dist|build|coverage|test-results|playwright-report|\.turbo|\.cache|artifacts)\\'; $ext='\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|json|md|sql|yml|yaml|env|toml|Dockerfile)$'; $groups = @( @{Name='secret-env'; Paths=@('apps/web','apps/backend','packages','scripts','docs'); Patterns=@('localStorage','sessionStorage','NEXT_PUBLIC','SERVICE_ROLE','API_KEY','PRIVATE_KEY','SIGNING','SECRET','OPENAI','XAI','COMET','DEEPSEEK','ANTHROPIC','ACTIVEPIECES','AP_','MCP')}, @{Name='network-runtime'; Paths=@('apps/web/src','apps/backend/src','packages'); Patterns=@('fetch\\(','axios','supabase\\.from','createClient','activepieces','ai-gateway','workflow-draft','canvas-ai','automation-builder','mcp','tool server','provider')}, @{Name='test-bypass'; Paths=@('apps','packages','tests','scripts'); Patterns=@('TODO','FIXME','skip\\(','test\\.skip','describe\\.skip','it\\.skip','\\.only\\(','force.*true','bypass','temporary','hack','allowUnsafe','ignorePolicy','disableValidation')}, @{Name='legacy-provider'; Paths=@('apps','packages','tests','docs'); Patterns=@('deepseek-chat','deepseek-reasoner','gpt-.*default','model selector','provider selector','direct provider','api\\.cometapi\\.com','api\\.openai\\.com','api\\.deepseek\\.com')} ); foreach ($group in $groups) { Write-Output ('### scan=' + $group.Name); Get-ChildItem -Path $group.Paths -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch $exclude -and ($_.Extension -match '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|json|md|sql|yml|yaml|env|toml)$' -or $_.Name -eq 'Dockerfile') } | Select-String -Pattern $group.Patterns -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 220 Path,LineNumber,Line | Format-List } }

name: contracts-and-packages
command: corepack pnpm check:contracts && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/contracts test && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/api-client build && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/workflow build && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/workflow test && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/workflow-dsl build && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/workflow-dsl test && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/workflow-compiler build && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/workflow-compiler test && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/ai-gateway build && corepack pnpm --filter @lexframe/ai-gateway test
